title: Resolve source-routing rule: SRD7: curvature diagnostics
description: Route: A_curv / e_curv / J_curv excluded from ordinary matter source roles. Allowed condition: curvature objects remain diagnostic/accounting/theorem-targeted unless source-neutral dynamics are derived. Forbidden condition: curvature diagnostics become matter sources, source reservoirs, or boundary repair currents. Consequence: curvature accounting remains diagnostic, not source energy..
